summary: Full regression pass for: (1) single-product catalog (Swaminarayan Lifafa), (2) tiered quantity pricing (100/200/500 -> 15/14/13 per pc), (3) completely rewritten 2-step checkout (Contact+Delivery -> Payment). Updated stale pytest assertions (21 products/4 categories -> 1 product/1 category) and reran full backend suite (16/16 pass). Ran extensive Playwright e2e covering homepage, product detail pricing tiers, +/- qty stepper floor/step, customize page, checkout step1 validation + step2 transition + Change-link data persistence, COD full order placement (WhatsApp tab + order-success redirect), simulated Razorpay full order placement (WhatsApp tab + order-success redirect), and mobile (390px) checkout layout. All passed with no bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.py, pricing.js, checkout/page.js are all clean and appropriately sized/scoped for current single-product scope; no DRY violations found.

Checkout order creation correctly combines firstName+lastName -> customerName, includes apartment in address string when provided, passes phone/whatsapp separately to /api/orders - matches spec exactly.
No discount/coupon field exists anywhere on checkout - confirmed via full page text scan.
Cosmetic checkboxes (emailOffers/smsOffers/saveInfo) confirmed as UI-only, not sent to backend order payload - consistent with problem statement's explicit note, not flagged as a bug.
seed_data_creation: Playwright e2e created a few TEST_-prefixed orders (COD and simulated Razorpay) via live checkout flow; not cleaned up but harmless test records in MongoDB orders collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified via API + browser: GET /api/products returns exactly 1 product (card-1, Swaminarayan Lifafa, description='', features=[], gallery=['/cards/swaminarayan-1.jpg']). GET /api/categories returns exactly 1 category (sacred-tradition). Product page: default qty=200 pre-selected, unit price ₹14; switching to 100/500 presets shows ₹15/₹13 correctly; custom qty=250 shows ₹14 (200-499 tier); +/- buttons step by 50 with floor of 100 confirmed (100 -> decrement stays 100, increment -> 150). Checkout: Contact+Delivery fields all present with correct types (State is a <select>, Country is fixed 'India' div, Apartment optional), no coupon/discount UI anywhere. Continue with empty fields shows toast error and stays on step1. Filling required fields switches Shipping row from 'Enter shipping address' to FREE/₹49 based on ₹999 threshold and transitions to step2 on Continue. Step2 shows entered name+phone+address summary with working 'Change' link that returns to step1 with all previously entered values still intact. Both COD and simulated-Razorpay full order flows tested end-to-end in real browser: order created via POST /api/orders, WhatsApp tab opened (wa.me link with correct order details), then redirected to /order-success?id=... showing correct order number/product/qty/total. Mobile (390px) checkout step1 and step2 both render with no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==clientWidth==390) and fields stack cleanly. WhatsApp floating pill verified present on homepage/product/customize/checkout pages.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no new bugs found this pass. Only fixed stale pytest assertions in test_printalaram_api.py (previously expected 21 products/4 categories/6 in royal-plum category from old multi-product catalog; now correctly expects 1 product/1 category matching current catalog.py single-product state) and one customization test referencing now-nonexistent 'card-2' productId (changed to 'card-1').
